meaning: n.砰击声,重击vi.砰的一声掉下,轰的一声vt.砰地击中
examples: His head hit the floor with a dull thud.
The gates shut behind him with a dull thud.
She tripped and fell with a sickening thud.
"He admits to hearing a thud as Freddy Martin struck the ground, " said Ms. Olsher-Tannen.
Her questions ended not in an inquisitorial lilt but with a descending, matter-of-fact thud.
